context: Tests whether the agent builds a quiz with the correct number of questions, proper UX controls (progress bar, skip option), routes completions to a product results page rather than just collecting data, and implements the full zero-party data pipeline from quiz answers through to ESP properties.

checklist.name: Max 3 questions
checklist.description: The quiz implementation contains no more than 3 questions/steps

checklist.name: Progress bar present
checklist.description: The quiz component renders a visible progress bar or step indicator that updates as the user advances

checklist.name: Quiz is skippable
checklist.description: The quiz component includes a skip or close mechanism so users can opt out of completing it

checklist.name: Post-completion redirect to results
checklist.description: On completing the quiz, the user is directed to a product results or recommendations page (not just a thank-you message or data collection confirmation)

checklist.name: Results page with curated recommendations
checklist.description: quiz-design.md describes that quiz completion leads to a curated product results or recommendations page (not merely data storage)

checklist.name: Quiz answer maps to profile field
checklist.description: Each quiz question maps its answer to a named CustomerProfile field (e.g. primaryUseCase, preferredCategories, budgetRange)

checklist.name: Profile field used as recommendation filter
checklist.description: quiz-pipeline.ts uses the profile field value to filter or rank product recommendations

checklist.name: Recommendation filter synced to ESP
checklist.description: quiz-pipeline.ts syncs the quiz answer or resulting profile field as a contact property in the ESP (email service provider)

checklist.name: Value exchange explained
checklist.description: quiz-design.md or the component includes copy explaining what the customer gets from answering (e.g. personalized recommendations, relevant emails)

checklist.name: Data flow documented
checklist.description: quiz-design.md includes a description or diagram of the data flow from quiz answer through to ESP property

checklist.name: Skip rationale documented
checklist.description: quiz-design.md explicitly mentions that the quiz is skippable and provides the rationale
